framework.name: Visa Trusted Agent Protocol
framework.description: A signature-based authentication protocol for AI agents in commerce contexts. Agents receive credentials from Visa, then generate time-bound, merchant-specific, non-replayable signatures when interacting with merchant sites. Merchants verify these signatures to distinguish 'trusted' commerce agents from malicious bots.
framework.raw_quote: New specifications include details related to signatures that are specific to the merchant and purpose, and are time bound, cannot be replayed or relayed.
